subcodes.first_line: O ye who are sincere, assured and faithful, ye who have been tested! By God, He hath truly preferred you above many [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المخلصون الموقنون المومنون الممتحنون تالله لقد آثرکم الله علی کثیر من
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
